name: token-optimizer
description: Reduce tokens sent to AI assistants. Compresses prose, trims code, summarizes logs, slices context by symbol/diff/repo-map, and supports local semantic search — all on-device.

commands.title: Token Optimizer: Compress Clipboard as Log
Token Optimizer: Compress Selection as Log
Token Optimizer: Optimize Selection (Replace In Place)
Token Optimizer: Diagnose (print state to output channel)
Token Optimizer: Rebuild Semantic Index (drop existing)
Token Optimizer: Show Semantic Index Stats

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with Token Optimizer
walkthroughs.description: Compress prompts, slice context, and save tokens — in five short steps.

steps.title: What Token Optimizer does
steps.description: An overview of the layered token-saving pipeline.

steps.title: Open the Prompt Panel
steps.description: Press Ctrl+Shift+O — your main workspace for optimizing prompts and logs.

steps.title: Try the @scope tags
steps.description: Inject context surgically: just the function, just the diff, just the N relevant files.

steps.title: Optional: enable semantic search
steps.description: Local embeddings for meaning-based code search. Opt-in, on-device.

steps.title: Tune to taste
steps.description: 15 settings to make compression match your style.

tokenOptimizer.defaultModel.description: Default model used for cost estimation and pricing display.

tokenOptimizer.tokenBudget.description: Target token budget per prompt. Used by future phases to size context windows.

tokenOptimizer.statusBar.enabled.description: Show the live token count in the VS Code status bar.

tokenOptimizer.statusBar.showCost.description: Append the estimated cost (for default model) to the status bar token count.

tokenOptimizer.trimmer.preset.description: Code trimmer preset (comments, console.logs, duplicate imports). Used when no @optimize tag is set.

tokenOptimizer.compressor.preset.markdownDescription:
Linguistic compressor preset.
- `light`: only whitespace + punctuation cleanup
- `default`: + remove politeness/hedging/meta-commentary, shorten verbose phrases
- `aggressive`: + strip filler adverbs and abbreviate technical terms (auth, app, config, …)

tokenOptimizer.logCompression.preset.description: (Phase 2) Default preset for log/terminal output compression.

tokenOptimizer.git.maxDiffTokens.description: Max tokens to include when injecting a git diff via @scope:diff / @scope:staged / @scope:last-commit. Larger diffs are truncated hunk-by-hunk with omission markers. Set to 0 to disable truncation.

tokenOptimizer.autoContext.maxFiles.description: Maximum number of files @scope:auto and the Suggest Context button will include.

tokenOptimizer.autoContext.maxTokensPerF.description: Skip any candidate file larger than this when auto-selecting context.

tokenOptimizer.repoMap.defaultLevel.markdownDescription:
Detail level used when `@scope:repo-map` is invoked without an explicit `:<level>`.
- `tree`: directory tree + file sizes (cheapest)
- `names`: file paths + top-level symbol names
- `signatures`: file paths + first line of each top-level symbol
- `auto`: pick the richest level that fits in the token budget

tokenOptimizer.repoMap.maxFiles.description: Maximum number of source files included in the repo map (hard cap on discovery).

tokenOptimizer.repoMap.excludeGlob.description: Additional glob to exclude on top of the built-in node_modules/out/dist/.git ignore list. Leave empty to use only the defaults.

tokenOptimizer.features.semanticSearch.description: (Phase 8, opt-in) Enable local semantic search. Downloads a small embedding model on first use.

tokenOptimizer.features.ollama.description: (Phase 9, opt-in) Route compression tasks to a locally running Ollama server when available.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
